ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the county belongs to */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the precinct belongs to */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "polling_station" TEXT /* Address of the polling station */,
  "num_voting_machines" INTEGER /* Number of voting machines in the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office (e.g., U.S. Senate) */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of office (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the district belongs to */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_type" TEXT /* Type of district (e.g., congressional, state, local) */,
  "boundary_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the district's boundaries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the candidate is running for */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "candidate_email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "candidate_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "candidate_party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the election is for */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general, special) */,
  "election_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting statistic */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate the statistic belongs to */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct the statistic is for */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Total votes for the candidate in the precinct */,
  "early_voting" INTEGER /* Number of early votes for the candidate */,
  "election_day" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the candidate on election day */,
  "absentee" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes for the candidate */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of voters in the precinct */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage */,
  "winner" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candidate won the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_statistics_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_statistics_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
